summary: Project management Kanban board app with task cards, status badges, column-based workflow (To Do/In Progress/Done), date filters, export functionality, and reminders panel.
known_issues: Reminders dropdown overlaps date filter buttons and Export button in top-right area
Color contrast issues: low contrast between text and background on cards, badges, and column headers (especially Done column with dark green bg)

existing_features.title: Reposition the Reminders dropdown panel so it does not overlap the Export button or the date filter buttons (This Week, This Month, Custom). The panel should open below the notification bell icon without covering any toolbar elements, ensuring proper z-index layering and positioning so all toolbar controls remain fully visible and accessible when the Reminders panel is open.

Fix color contrast issues across the entire application. Specifically: (1) The 'Done' column header currently has a very dark green background — ensure the header text and icon are clearly readable against it. (2) Task cards in all columns must have sufficient contrast between card background and body text, assignee names, and date text. (3) Status badge text (To Do, In Progress, Done) must contrast clearly against their badge background colors. (4) Column header badges (task count circles) must have readable text on their background. (5) All body text throughout the app must meet a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against its background. Avoid pairing similarly dark or similarly light colors for text and background.

projectName: Fix Reminders panel overlap and color contrast issues
